RULING: The Court grants final approval of class action settlement. Order, and judgment signed in open court. (AJR-AS/CW)

Schonbrun, Esq. 510/547-8070 applicant to appear as amicus curiae counsel or, in alternative, to appoint amicus curiae counsel.

MINI MINUTES: ADD-ON.
APPEAR: Jeffrey H. Lerman, Esq. 492-4505 for pltfs; Timothy E. Carr, Esq. & Catherine Watkins, Esq. 217-6000 for defts Buena Vista Books, Inc. and Buena Vista Publishing Group, Inc.; Lawrence W. Schonbrun, Esq. 510/547-8070 applicant to appear as amicus curiae counsel or, in alternative, to appoint amicus curiae counsel (appearing telephonically).
RULING: Argued and the Court vacates the 06/20/02 3:30pm hearing for final approval and amicus motion and continues the matters to 06/21/02 at 3:30pm. Amicus file by 5pm 06/17; pltf reply due by 2pm 06/20. (AJR/AS(EX))

Notice Of Motion For Final Approval Of Class Action Settlement
Off Calendar May-24-2002 Continued To Jun-20-02 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: Andrew A. August, Esq. 394-5700, Jeffrey H. Lerman, Esq. 492-4505, & Daniel A. Osborn, Esq. 212/888-9000 for pltfs; Timothy E. Carr, Esq. & Catherine Watkins, Esq. 217-6000 & Kenneth E. Newman, Esq. 212/456-6080 for defts Buena Vista Books, Inc. and Buena Vista Publishing Group, Inc.; Lawrence W. Schonbrun, Esq. 510/547-8070 applicant to appear as amicus curiae counsel or, in alternative, to appoint amicus curiae counsel.
RULING: Argued and the Court continues the motion for final approval, and amicus motion to 06/20/02 at 3:30pm. Mr. Carr & Mr. August to file additional briefs by 06/11; Mr. Schonbrun to file 06/14; 5 page limit. (AJR/CW)

For Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement
Off Calendar May-24-2002 Text Ruling

For Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement
Off Calendar Feb-14-2002 Continued To May-23-02 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: Andrew A. August, Esq. 394-5700, Jeffrey H. Lerman, Esq. 492-4505, & Daniel A. Osborn, Esq. 212/888-9000 for pltf & moving party; Timothy E. Carr, Esq. & Catherine A. Watkins, Esq. 217-6000 for defts & opposing parties Buena Vista Books, Inc. & Buena Vista Publishing Group, Inc.
RULING: Argued and the Court grants the preliminary approval for class settlement with conditions (stated on the record). Court sets final approval hearing for 05/23/02 at 3:30pm; publication to be completed by 03/16; opt-outs by 04/26; papers in support to be submitted by 05/09; claim process to be handled by Judge Cahill.
